name: Voracious Resolve
descriptionTemplate: {Discover} 1 of 3 basic Skill Commands from the Awakeners in team; it has {Exhaust}, and its Arithmetica Cost -1. If the Realm includes {Caro}, you may choose "Gobble Up!"
lore:
This is the Promised Land sworn by Mythag to her warriors—where jars overflow with honey and cabinets groan with meat.
No force may bar the brave; what is theirs by right, they shall claim.
